summary: Sales CRM Testing Complete - All features verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly including login with app selector, dashboard stats, sidebar navigation, pipeline Kanban board, and mobile responsive design.
critical_code_review_comments: Sales CRM login with section-based auth working correctly - redirects to /workspace/sales
ServiceBook login redirects to /workspace/servicebook as expected
Sales Dashboard shows all 5 stats cards: Total Leads, New (Untouched), Contacted, Converted, Today Visitors
Quick action links (Run Lead Scraper, Sales Pipeline, Visitor Analytics) all functional
Sales sidebar navigation works: Dashboard, All Leads, Lead Scraper, Visitor Analytics, Sales Pipeline
Switch to ServiceBook link in Sales sidebar navigates correctly
Sales Pipeline Kanban board shows all 5 stages: New, Contacted, Qualified, Converted, Lost
Lead Scraper page UI renders correctly with locations, business types, and search sources
Logout from Sales CRM redirects to login page and invalidates token
Mobile responsive design working - hamburger menu opens sidebar on mobile
All data-testid attributes properly placed for testing
seed_data_creation: Test lead created via API test (TEST_Sales_Lead)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales CRM fully functional. Login uses section-based auth (section: 'sales' or 'servicebook'). Employee must have 'sales' in apps_access array to access Sales CRM. Lead Scraper actual scraping will NOT work in preview environment (egress blocked) - only UI renders.
